seo_title: Cariloha Resort Bamboo Bed Sheets — Sleep Discovery
seo_description: Instead of conventional cotton, consider Cariloha Resort bamboo bed sheets — breathable, resort-soft bedding with honest context for your sleep ecosystem.

faqs.q: Are these good for hot sleepers?
faqs.a: Many buyers choose bamboo bedding for breathability and a cooler feel. Individual results vary by climate, bedding layers, and personal preference.
Cariloha Resort sheets are bamboo viscose in a sateen weave. Check the product page for the latest material and care details.
